잠언 1:1.content: The proverbs of Solomon, the son of David, king of Israel:

잠언 1:2.content: to know wisdom and instruction; to discern the words of understanding;

잠언 1:3.content: to receive instruction in wise dealing, in righteousness, justice, and equity;

잠언 1:4.content: to give prudence to the simple, knowledge and discretion to the young man:

잠언 1:5.content: that the wise man may hear, and increase in learning; that the man of understanding may attain to sound counsel:

잠언 1:6.content: to understand a proverb, and parables, the words and riddles of the wise.

잠언 1:7.content: The fear of Yahweh is the beginning of knowledge; but the foolish despise wisdom and instruction.

잠언 1:8.content: My son, listen to your father’s instruction, and don’t forsake your mother’s teaching:

잠언 1:9.content: for they will be a garland to grace your head, and chains around your neck.

잠언 1:10.content: My son, if sinners entice you, don’t consent.

잠언 1:11.content: If they say, “Come with us. Let’s lay in wait for blood. Let’s lurk secretly for the innocent without cause.

잠언 1:12.content: Let’s swallow them up alive like Sheol, and whole, like those who go down into the pit.

잠언 1:13.content: We’ll find all valuable wealth. We’ll fill our houses with plunder.

잠언 1:14.content: You shall cast your lot among us. We’ll all have one purse.”

잠언 1:15.content: My son, don’t walk on the path with them. Keep your foot from their path,

잠언 1:16.content: for their feet run to evil. They hurry to shed blood.

잠언 1:17.content: For the net is spread in vain in the sight of any bird;

잠언 1:18.content: but these lay in wait for their own blood. They lurk secretly for their own lives.

잠언 1:19.content: So are the ways of everyone who is greedy for gain. It takes away the life of its owners.

잠언 1:20.content: Wisdom calls aloud in the street. She utters her voice in the public squares.

잠언 1:21.content: She calls at the head of noisy places. At the entrance of the city gates, she utters her words:

잠언 1:22.content: “How long, you simple ones, will you love simplicity? How long will mockers delight themselves in mockery, and fools hate knowledge?

잠언 1:23.content: Turn at my reproof. Behold, I will pour out my spirit on you. I will make known my words to you.

잠언 1:24.content: Because I have called, and you have refused; I have stretched out my hand, and no one has paid attention;

잠언 1:25.content: but you have ignored all my counsel, and wanted none of my reproof;

잠언 1:26.content: I also will laugh at your disaster. I will mock when calamity overtakes you,

잠언 1:27.content: when calamity overtakes you like a storm, when your disaster comes on like a whirlwind, when distress and anguish come on you.

잠언 1:28.content: Then they will call on me, but I will not answer. They will seek me diligently, but they will not find me;

잠언 1:29.content: because they hated knowledge, and didn’t choose the fear of Yahweh.

잠언 1:30.content: They wanted none of my counsel. They despised all my reproof.

잠언 1:31.content: Therefore they will eat of the fruit of their own way, and be filled with their own schemes.

잠언 1:32.content: For the backsliding of the simple will kill them. The careless ease of fools will destroy them.

잠언 1:33.content: But whoever listens to me will dwell securely, and will be at ease, without fear of harm.”
